lines.english: No filth sticks to the Gurmukh.
The Gurmukh eradicates egotism from within.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell within the mind of the Gurmukh. ||2||
Through karma and Dharma, good actions and righteous faith, the Gurmukh becomes true.
The Gurmukh burns away egotism and duality.
The Gurmukh is attuned to the Naam, and is at peace. ||3||
Instruct your own mind, and understand Him.
The Gurmukh understands, and is always at peace. ||4||
You may preach to other people, but no one will listen.
The self-willed manmukhs are such clever hypocrites.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kamaavai su thaae na paaee |
lines.english: No matter what they do, it is not acceptable.
They come and go in reincarnation, and find no place of rest. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਗ ਜਿਉ ਲਾਇ ਬਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਧਿਆਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bag jiau laae bahai nit dhiaanaa |
lines.english: They sit there, like storks, pretending to meditate.
The manmukhs perform their rituals, but they are totally selfish and conceited.
Caught by the Messenger of Death, they shall regret and repent in the end. ||6||
The Guru is the Great Giver, throughout the four ages. ||7||
By Guru's Grace, one meets the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve mukat na hoee |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, liberation is not obtained.
Maya, the daughter of the ocean, has been slain.
O Nanak, without the Name, all clever tricks are false. ||8||2||
For the Gurmukh, the Naam is social status, honor and glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਕਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਪੜਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug kaa dharam parrahu tum bhaaee |
lines.english: Learn the Dharma of this age, O Siblings of Destiny;
Gauree, Third Mehl:
all understanding is obtained from the Perfect Guru.
By Guru's Grace, your filth shall be washed away. ||1||Pause||
Learn of the Lord, and contemplate Him in your mind.
Here and hereafter, the Lord's Name is our Companion. ||1||
Through argument and debate, He cannot be found.
The mind and body are made insipid through the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sach liv laae |2|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, lovingly attune yourself to the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਜਮੁ ਕਰੇ ਖੁਆਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhette jam kare khuaaraa |3|
lines.english: Without meeting the Guru, they are tortured by Death. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: nit teerath naavai na jaae ahankaaraa |
lines.english: By taking cleansing baths daily at sacred shrines of pilgrimage, egotism is not eliminated.
This world is polluted with egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਜਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so jan saachaa ji haumai maarai |
lines.english: Those humble beings are true, who conquer their ego.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they conquer the five thieves.
They save themselves, and save all their generations as well. ||4||
The self-willed manmukhs cling blindly to it.
The Gurmukhs remain detached, and lovingly attune themselves to the Lord. ||5||
The Actor has staged the drama of emotional attachment to Maya.
The disguisers put on their various disguises.
They do not understand themselves, and they lose the game of life. ||6||
Desire rages within them, and they carry on egotistically.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin gur seve bahut dukh paaee |7|
lines.english: Without serving the Guru, they suffer in terrible pain. ||7||
Putting on religious robes, they act so clever,
but they are totally deluded by doubt and emotional attachment to Maya.
O Nanak, those who serve the True Guru are blessed and very fortunate. ||8||3||
Those who are attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, remain detached forever.
Even as householders, they lovingly attune themselves to the True Lord.
Gauree, Third Mehl:
Brahma is the founder of the study of the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੇ ਦੇਵ ਮੋਹ ਪਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis te upaje dev moh piaasaa |
lines.english: From him emanated the gods, enticed by desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਭਰਮੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trai gun bharame naahee nij ghar vaasaa |1|
lines.english: They wander in the three qualities, and they do not dwell within their own home. ||1||
The Lord has saved me; I have met the True Guru.
The songs of Brahma entangle people in the three qualities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਵਾਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਜਮਕਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: parr vaad vakhaaneh sir maare jamakaalaa |
lines.english: Reading about the debates and disputes, they are hit over the head by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat har naam drirraaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has implanted devotional worship of the Lord's Name, night and day. ||1||Pause||
